title: delissea holophylla
intro: Delissea holophylla, also known as Hawaiian mountain bell, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and it is often used to treat colds and other infections. Delissea holophylla can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also sometimes used in herbal remedies and supplements, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
